ddt:Target.Name: P9X X73 EOBD CHP
ddt:Target.Description: Calculateur Injection Common Rail DENSO -ISUZU P9X Euro III EOBD X73 Phase 1 Base compatible avec soft ID= BF00 4410 nnnn Developpement ID= BF00 5200 nnnn Série nnnn = 10xx (130KW) = 11xx (120KW) réalisé Par Clément PETIT & Charles-Hubert PERRE Change by C.CANDAS 16 dec 2003

Data.Name: Air mass flow sensor physical value
Booleen indicating whether eeprom vl3 failure
Byte upon reception of AIRBAG_crash frame coherent
Cruise or Limit speed selected by driver
cylinder no.1 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.2 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.3 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.4 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.5 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.6 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
Deactivation because set speed ratio is incoherent
Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection
Deactivation due to CC SL failure detection
Deactivation due to engine control problem
Deactivation due to engine gearbox disconnection
Deactivation due to invalid vehicle speed
Deactivation due to out of date vehicle speed
Deactivation due to suspend switch press
Diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_crach frame
Failure present on both brake contacts
Failure present on one of the two brake contacts
Failure present on steering wheel control
Failure recorded on both brake contacts
Failure recorded on one of the two brake contact
Failure recorded on steering wheel control
FF A Air flow rate from MAF sensor
FF A Common rail pressure sensor
FF A Final fuel delivery timing
FF A Intake mani. absolute pressure
FF A Target common rail pressure
FF B Air flow rate from MAF sensor
FF B Common rail pressure sensor
FF B Intake mani. absolute pressure
FF B WG valve lift sensor
FF C Air flow rate from MAF sensor
FF C Common rail pressure sensor
FF C Intake mani. absolute pressure
FF D Air flow rate from MAF sensor
FF D Common rail pressure sensor
FF D IJF signal level pattern
FF D Intake mani. absolute pressure
FF D Pump target suction value
final fuel delivery of noroad max revolution

Item.Text: Analog sensor reference voltage output No1
Analog sensor reference voltage output No2
Turbo lift sensor or waist gate valve
Glow controller command line or Both banks
Suction control valve No1 or No2
Cruise control, ACC/speed limiter ON/OFF switch
Injector command or EDU or injector

Data.Name: fuel control cylinder balance compensation out of limit status
fuel delivery of smoke Limit under steady condition
Group of DTC all the failure
intake air temperature sensor physical value
local ID of Each input value 1
local ID of Each input value 2
local ID of fuel delivery control 1 - output
local ID of fuel delivery control 2
local ID of Present Past fail 1-8
local ID of Present Past fail 9-15
local ID of Pump Injector Info - output
Number of output to be_controlled cs
State change detection LV position with security on config detect
State change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches
State change detection RV position with security on config detect
State change detection stop brake contact

Data.Name: Number of ouptut to controlled cs

DataItem.Name: Booleen indicating whether eeprom vl3 failure
